EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The task "{object.name}" is created on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The task "{object.name}" is reconfigured on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The task "{object.name}" is started on vCenter host {event_src.host}
Unable to complete the task "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The task "{object.name}" is completed on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The task "{object.name}" is removed on vCenter host {event_src.host}
